title: Thembisa school shooting: Principal and administrator killed
description: NATIONAL NEWS - Learners and the wider...
bodyText:
NATIONAL NEWS - Learners and the wider Thembisa community have been left reeling after a shooting at Inxiweni Primary School yesterday, in which the school’s principal and an administrative staff member were fatally wounded inside the administration block.

Kempton Express reports that according to preliminary information, the incident took place at around 17:00 while the 58-year-old principal, the 55-year-old administrator and other staff members were preparing for a meeting scheduled for later in the week.


## Staff hid after hearing gunshots


It is alleged that staff working in a nearby office heard sudden gunshots. Fearing for their safety, they hid until the situation appeared to have calmed. When they emerged, they reportedly found both victims lying in the passage of the admin block.


## Emergency services responded swiftly


Gauteng Department of Education spokesperson Steve Mabona tells Kempton Express that emergency services were called immediately, but it was too late to save the two women.

“The colleagues immediately contacted emergency services, who responded swiftly. Sadly, both the principal and the administrative staff member were declared dead at the scene,” says Mabona.


## Police launch investigation


Police have since launched a full investigation into the circumstances surrounding the shooting.

Gauteng Premier Panyaza Lesufi and Education MEC Matome Chiloane visited the school last night to assess the scene and gather information. They also met both families to offer their condolences and support.

Mabona confirms that psychosocial support teams, including officials from the Ekurhuleni North District, will be deployed to provide counselling and trauma support to learners and staff.

Article: Caxton Network News

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
